channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South Africa Commends Proteas Women for Excellence in ICC Women's T20 World Cup Despite Loss
item.description: The South African government has expressed admiration for the Proteas Women cricket team's performance in the ICC Women's T20 World Cup, despite their defeat to England by 40 runs in the final. The Go...

item.title: Ukrainian Woman Under Investigation for Monaco Bomb Attack
item.description: The article discusses an error message encountered when attempting to access a news story about a police investigation into a Ukrainian woman suspected of involvement in a bomb attack in Monaco. News ...

item.title: Wallabies Begin Test Season with Ireland Match in Sydney
item.description: The Wallabies face Ireland in their Test season opener at Allianz Stadium, marking a significant match for coach Joe Schmidt's final Test. Despite past inconsistencies, the team aims to build on their...

item.title: Aurangzeb's Complex Legacy as a Mughal Emperor
item.description: The article provides a nuanced analysis of Aurangzeb, the 17th-century Mughal emperor, challenging simplistic narratives of him as either a destroyer of Hindu civilization or a defender of Muslim iden...

item.title: Zari Hassan Addresses Claims of Being Jonasi's Female Version
item.description: South Africa-based Ugandan socialite Zari Hassan has publicly dismissed claims by Kenyans on social media who compare her to Jonasi Gomora, the toxic protagonist of Netflix's The Polygamist. In a TikT...

item.title: The Future of Democracy and AI Governance
item.description: The original text explores complex themes of political philosophy, democracy, and the role of artificial intelligence in governance. It critiques traditional democratic systems, referencing Plato's 'p...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Tie the Knot at Madison Square Garden Ceremony
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married in a high-profile ceremony at Madison Square Garden, with actor Adam Sandler serving as the officiant. The event, shrouded in secrecy, featured a star-studded gue...

item.title: House prosecution says VP Sara Duterte’s attendance will not impact impeachment case
item.description: The House prosecution team has stated that Vice President Sara Duterte’s decision to appear or not appear at her impeachment trial will not affect the strength or progress of their case. According to ...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif Encourages Turkish Investment in Key Sectors
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has invited Turkish companies to expand their investments in Pakistan across sectors like energy, infrastructure, and IT. During his official visit to Turkey, he held mee...

item.title: Alkaline Trio Cancel UK 2026 Tour Due to Frontman's Health Concerns
item.description: Alkaline Trio, the Chicago punk rock band, have announced the cancellation of their 2026 UK tour, including a headline performance at 2000trees festival, due to medical issues faced by frontman Matt S...

item.title: Protesters Oppose Expanded US Military Access During PH-US Friendship Day
item.description: Protesters in the Philippines have expressed strong opposition to the expanded military access agreements between the country and the United States, particularly during the annual PH-US Friendship Day...

item.title: Taylor Swift's New York Wedding Faces Logistical Challenges
item.description: Taylor Swift's highly anticipated New York wedding has sparked widespread interest, with fans and media scrutinizing every detail. The event, hosted at Madison Square Garden, is part of a multi-day ce...

item.title: Kaptagat Cycling Challenge Sees 30% Increase in Cyclists, Combines Sport with Forest Conservation
item.description: The fourth edition of the Kaptagat Cycling Challenge has attracted a record 130 cyclists, marking a 30% increase in participation. The event, held in Elgeyo Marakwet County, combines elite competition...

item.title: Study connects leafy greens to improved lung health
item.description: A recent study published in a reputable health journal has found a significant correlation between the consumption of leafy green vegetables and enhanced lung function. Researchers from McMaster Unive...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial Features NBI Officials and HREP Director as Witnesses
item.description: The impeachment trial of Sara Duterte, the daughter of former President Duterte, has seen the involvement of key officials from the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) and the Human Rights Enforcem...

item.title: 104 Nigerian soldiers missing after Boko Haram attack on Borno base
item.description: A military document obtained by SaharaReporters reveals that 104 Nigerian soldiers from the 162 Amphibious Battalion are reportedly missing weeks after a June 5 attack on the Mandaragirau base in Born...

item.title: Game Preservation Group Argues Piracy Is Currently the Only Practical Way to Preserve Video Games
item.description: The Video Game History Foundation (VGHF), led by founder Frank Cifaldi, has reiterated its position that piracy has become the only effective method for preserving many video games, due largely to ind...

item.title: Nathalie and Alain Delon's Marriage: A Glimpse into Their 1960s Life
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of striking photographs capturing the iconic marriage of Nathalie and Alain Delon during the 1960s. The couple, renowned for their magnetic chemistry and ele...

item.title: Julian Casablancas Discusses White Privilege and American Zionism at Oxford Union Speech
item.description: Julian Casablancas, frontman of The Strokes, has sparked significant debate by expanding on his previous comments about white privilege and American Zionism during a speech at the Oxford Union. The di...

item.title: Ghana's World Cup exit attributed to lack of experience, says coach
item.description: Ghana's early exit from the FIFA World Cup 2026 has been blamed on a lack of experience and poor composure under pressure, according to coach Carlos Queiroz. The African team's 1-0 defeat by Colombia ...
